## touch-browser v0.1.10

- Fixed MCP bridge lifecycle ordering so `initialize` completes before `tools/list` can respond.
- Aligned the Rust workspace version, MCP bridge implementation version, MCP registry metadata, Docker install metadata, and npm package version on `0.1.10`.
- Prepared the Glama inspection and release flow to use the same `0.1.10` release identifier end-to-end.
